generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values preparedness and security, you know how important it is to have a robust civil defense system. Recent studies show that our current preparedness programs are actually making us less safe by diverting critical resources from our military. We can't afford to neglect our national defense while focusing on these local initiatives. Let's prioritize our military's needs and ensure our country is truly protected. #NationalSecurityFirst #CivilDefenseReform
